meme.title: If you know, you know. That 1,000,000% hits different

headlines.h: Opinion: When the tuna hits different and you start acting rich (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.
Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.
Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.

headlines.h: Science Desk Investigates: Louie voicing his discontent that I came home at 3 am 😂
headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.
